behavior_summary: U8P_STATUE1::look is a simple examine/U8P_STATUE1::look handler for the STATUE1 object. When the player examines the statue it displays the short text 'statue ' and then executes a suspend instruction.

No branching, global flags, parameters, locals, or calls to other game logic are present in this excerpt; the behavior is limited to presenting the short description and yielding/ending the U8P_STATUE1::look process.
notable_control_flow: Linear: display a single bark line then suspend. There are no conditions or menu interactions.
The presence of a suspend node indicates the U8P_STATUE1::look process yields or terminates immediately after showing the message.
